description_long: This object is a compact, utilitarian shotgun with a minimalist design, featuring a cylindrical barrel and a simple, straight receiver. The stock is a skeletal, folding type, providing lightweight support and easy storage, while the grip is integrated into the main body for streamlined handling. The trigger guard is elongated and rectangular, offering ample space for finger placement and protection. The barrel is single and unadorned, with no visible ribbing or venting, and the overall finish is matte black, suggesting a focus on function over aesthetics. The construction appears to be primarily metal, with a few small components possibly made of polymer or plastic. This shotgun is designed for practical use in urban environments, prioritizing portability and ease of use.
description: A compact, matte black shotgun with a folding skeletal stock, single barrel, and elongated rectangular trigger guard. Its utilitarian design emphasizes portability and function.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length, folding skeletal stock, single barrel, and rectangular trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the stock and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, revealing the same folding stock and barrel, with the ejection port and magazine well visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open skeletal stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated rectangular trigger guard with a simple, open design and no finger grooves
